title: "Trail Maintenance & Wayfinding Steward - Anceu Coliving"
description: "We are looking for a Trail Maintenance & Wayfinding Steward to volunteer with us at Anceu Coliving."
og_image: /wp-content/uploads/2024/10/fixar_anceu__alberte_peiteavel_245_A7309782-_-1.jpg

---

## About the role of trail maintenance & wayfinding steward

We live in a place with lots of forest around us. There are old walking paths nearby, but many are now covered by bushes and hard to find. We want to open them again and keep them clear so people can walk safely through the woods.

## What you’ll do

-   Cut back bushes and clear small plants so the paths stay open
-   Mark the trails with paint or simple signs so people don’t get lost
-   Walk the paths regularly to check if they need more work
-   Help us keep a simple map or notes about the trails
-   *Work schedule: **Monday to Friday, 10:00 to 13:00 (15 hours per week)***
-   Stay: **1 month**

![](data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAABAAAAAMAAQAAAACSwSigAAAAAnRSTlMAAHaTzTgAAAB2SURBVHja7cEBAQAAAIIg/69uSEABAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADvBoMPAAHlAN1UAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC)

![](https://anceu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/huerta-2-1024x768.jpg)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](https://anceu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/IMG_9651.jpg)

## What you’ll get

-   A **private room** in our coliving house
-   **All meals and basics included**: coffee, tea, milk, bread, and kitchen supplies
-   Free use of shared spaces: kitchen, living room, garden, and coworking area
-   A chance to live with a friendly, international group of people doing creative and community projects
-   Peaceful countryside life with birds, trees, and fresh air

## How to apply

-   Send us an email to [hello@anceu.com](hello@anceu.com) with the subject *Trail maintenance and Wayfinding steward*
-   We accept candidates for the months of April, May, October and November.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](https://anceu.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/taller1.jpg)
